name: agent-polyglot-skills
description: Agent skill collection for agent-polyglot cross-harness evaluation workflows.

scripts.check: node bin/agent-polyglot-skills.js list && node bin/agent-polyglot-skills.js where --harness codex --json >/dev/null && node bin/agent-polyglot-skills.js where --harness codex --project-dir /tmp/agent-polyglot-skills-check --json >/dev/null
